symptom: PUBLISHED status text mismatch (badge renders 'Published' not 'PUBLISHED') — FIXED
reproduction: Was: test checked exact 'PUBLISHED'; badge renders 'Published'. Also: manual Publish button needed when doc is RENDERED
suspected_root_cause: DocumentStatusBadge uses title-case label; workflow requires manual Publish click after RENDERED state
suggested_fix: Fixed in 06-document-pipeline.spec.ts: check 'Published' (title case) + click Publish button if visible

symptom: Tests fail with libnspr4.so not found on VPS reboot
reproduction: Reboot VPS then run pnpm e2e:lims
suspected_root_cause: Playwright Chromium requires system libs not present on bare Ubuntu 24.04; workaround uses /tmp/ which is ephemeral
suggested_fix: Run: sudo npx playwright install --with-deps (needs root); or add persistent LD_LIBRARY_PATH to systemd service env

symptom: Second order-lab call returns 200 instead of 409
suspected_root_cause: No duplicate-order guard in orderLab command handler; test 10 documents this as "allowed" behavior
suggested_fix: Add guard: if encounter has active lab order return 409 (define business rule first)

symptom: Verification badge refetch test takes 8879ms (>5s warn threshold)
suspected_root_cause: API response time for verify command + UI refetch cycle under test load
suggested_fix: Profile verify command endpoint; add database index on encounter.id + status

symptom: Results page inputs use placeholder text selector (fragile)
reproduction: Change placeholder text then run tests/05-operator-workflow.spec.ts
suspected_root_cause: data-testid added to value inputs but selector in test uses placeholder fallback
suggested_fix: Ensure all tests use data-testid selectors; remove placeholder-text fallbacks

suspected_root_cause: Network round-trip for verify command + modal close animation + status refetch
suggested_fix: Add loading skeleton to verify modal; API should return quickly but UI waits for refetch

symptom: Tests may interfere if t1/t2 seed data is modified between runs
reproduction: Delete t1 catalog test then run full suite
suspected_root_cause: All E2E tests share same t1/t2 catalog seed; no per-test isolation
suggested_fix: Add per-test catalog fixture that creates unique test codes; or add beforeAll seed validation

symptom: Chaos test never runs in automated CI pipeline
suspected_root_cause: Playwright E2E CI job disabled (no persistent VPS env in GitHub Actions)
suggested_fix: Set up self-hosted runner or enable CI with service containers; wire e2e:lims:nightly to cron schedule

symptom: Publish page polls every 3s but only when browser tab is active
reproduction: Navigate away from publish page mid-test
suspected_root_cause: setInterval polling pauses when tab is backgrounded; test 06 keeps tab active but worker may be slow
suggested_fix: Replace polling with SSE endpoint or WebSocket subscription for real-time document status

symptom: docker compose ps shows admin and operator as unhealthy
suspected_root_cause: Healthcheck endpoint misconfigured for Next.js apps (not a functional issue)
suggested_fix: Add /api/health route to Next.js apps or fix healthcheck URL in docker-compose.yml
